subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1915-07-24 in Haifa
subcodes.first_line: Most prolonged was it, extending over a span of four years. Similarly did the advent of vessels, railways and tramways render travel with facility [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: خیلی مطول بود و چهار سال طول کشید.  هم چنین بیان اینکه کشتی ها و راه آهن و تراموای مسافرت را آسان کرده
subcodes.subjects: @development of capacity and readiness, @education of children; moral education, @translation; publication of the Sacred Writings, @the power of words; of speech
